{ "name": "laravel/prompts", "type": "library", "description": "Add beautiful and user-friendly forms to your command-line applications.", "license": "MIT", "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Laravel\\Prompts\\": "src/" }, "files": [ "src/helpers.php" ] }, "autoload-dev": { "psr-4": { "Tests\\": "tests/" } }, "require": { "php": "^8.1", "ext-mbstring": "*", "composer-runtime-api": "^2.2", "symfony/console": "^6.2|^7.0|^8.0" }, "require-dev": { "illuminate/collections": "^10.0|^11.0|^12.0|^13.0", "phpstan/phpstan": "^1.12.28", "pestphp/pest": "^2.3|^3.4|^4.0", "mockery/mockery": "^1.5", "phpstan/phpstan-mockery": "^1.1.3" }, "conflict": { "illuminate/console": ">=10.17.0 <10.25.0", "laravel/framework": ">=10.17.0 <10.25.0" }, "suggest": { "ext-pcntl": "Required for the spinner to be animated." }, "config": { "audit": { "block-insecure": false }, "allow-plugins": { "pestphp/pest-plugin": true } }, "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "0.3.x-dev" } }, "prefer-stable": true, "minimum-stability": "dev" }
